channel.title: Request on Coffee time
channel.description: Recent content in Request on Coffee time

item.title: An easy way to validate Go request
item.description: When building REST API or web applications using Go, an essential part is to validate the incoming request data. I have worked in some small and medium project in Golang, most of them are micro-services, providing restful api. I have used different way to validate incoming data. Lets start with particular one that I use frequently. For validating application/json or text/plain request, first I build a struct type of that particular request and add a validate method on the struct.
